parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.N8N_FROM_EMAIL, to: $json.donorEmail, subject: 'Thank you for your giving — AKCC', html: '

Thank you for your generosity!

Dear ' + $json.donorNameHtml + ',

Your gift to AKCC has been received. Your generosity helps us serve the Kachin community and advance the Kingdom of God.

' + $json.amountDisplay + '

' + $json.fundLabel + '

A giving statement is available on request from the church admin.

Australian Kachin Christian Church · ABN 00 000 000 000

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.N8N_FROM_EMAIL, to: $env.ADMIN_EMAIL, subject: 'Giving Received: ' + $json.amountDisplay, html: '

A new gift has been received:

Donor' + $json.donorNameHtml + '
Email' + $json.donorEmailHtml + '
Amount' + $json.amountDisplay + '
Fund' + $json.fundLabel + '
Session' + $json.sessionId + '
' }) }}

meta.notes: Triggered by Stripe checkout.session.completed via POST /api/webhooks/stripe. Sends thank-you to donor + admin notification. Requires: N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, N8N_FROM_EMAIL, ADMIN_EMAIL in deploy/n8n/.env. Also add STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to Vercel env vars and register the webhook in Stripe dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → endpoint: https://<app-url>/api/webhooks/stripe, event: checkout.session.completed.
